Feats — Male Human Rogue: 8
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 14 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Criminal Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 4; Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 2; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 40185/48000 Level: 8 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Fate: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity): Ability Boost (Dexterity)
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Ability Boost (Strength)
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 12 to distribute
Second-Story Work: Has a 30' climb Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Archery; Boon Of Combat Prowess; Boon Of Dimensional Travel; Boon Of Fate; Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity); Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength); Boon Of Spell Recall; Boon Of The Night Spirit; Boon Of Truesight; Defense; Grappler; Great Weapon Fighting; Magic Initiate (Cleric); Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker; Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Rogue Features: Armor Training (Light); Cunning Action; Cunning Strike; Evasion; Expertise; Fast Hands; Reliable Talent; Rogue Subclass; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Sneak Attack; Steady Aim; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons) Criminal Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence); Alert; Skill Proficiency (Sleight Of Hand; Stealth); Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools)
Feature Notes:
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Arcana; Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Animal Handling; Nature; Perception; Sleight Of Hand
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +5 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +8 Stealth: (dex) +5
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +7 Survival: (wis) +1
Tool Proficiency: Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Sylvan
Skill Notes:
Expertise: +3 on 4 chosen proficient skills
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool checks
Second-Story Work: -1' running jump distance
Thieves'Cant: Understands jargon and signs known only by rogues
Combat
Hit Points: 36 Initiative: +5 Armor Class: 14
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Padded Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+6 1d4+3 P R20/60; Nick); Javelin (+6 1d6+3 P R30/120; Slow); Light Hammer (+6 1d4+3 B R20/60; Nick); Unarmed (+6 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +3 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +8
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Can treat an attack miss as a hit once per turn
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Can teleport 30' after attacking or casting
Boon Of Fate: R60' Can modify a d20 roll by 2d4 once per initiative or rest
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +15 damage
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +16 damage
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Can use a bonus action to become invisible in dim or no light; taking an action, bonus action, or reaction ends
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict a choice of: poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 15' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Fast Hands: Can use a bonus action to disarm a trap, open a lock, pick a pocket, or take a Utilize action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sneak Attack: Inflicts +4d6 HP on attacks with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature once per turn
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action and forego moving to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage from a seen attacker by half
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Intelligence
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +5; Intelligence: +5; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes:
Boon Of The Night Spirit: In dim or no light, has resistance to all damage other than psychic and radiant
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Magic
Attack: C: +4; D: +4; W: +5 Spell DC: C: 12; D: 12; W: 13
Magic Notes:
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Notes
Validation Errors:
Archery Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Boon Of Combat Prowess Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Dimensional Travel Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Fate Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity) Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength) Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Spell Recall Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19 and spellcasting feature
Boon Of The Night Spirit Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Truesight Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Defense Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Feat Allocation: 3 available vs. 20 allocated
Great Weapon Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Two-Weapon Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
